# Sequential Debug Log: Strict Type Enforcement & Audit

**Issue Addressed**: Some files are still using `env: any` instead of the globally available `Env` type generated by Wrangler. Additionally, a full project type check is required to ensure no regressions were introduced during the Next.js 15 upgrade.

## Fixing Checklist

- [x] task 4 - Custom Middleware Alignment
  > **Summary:** Replace all instances of `env: any` with `env: Env` across the codebase (specifically in `src/worker.ts`, `src/worker-middleware.ts`, and the `MiddlewareHandler` definition).
- [x] task 3 - Async Server Primitives Refactor
  > **Summary:** Run `npm run check` (or `npx tsc --noEmit`) to identify any remaining type errors resulting from the Next.js 15 async API transition and resolve them surgically.
